creator: darius@dons.net.au
text:
(In reply to Zsolt Udvari from comment #12)
Hi Zsolt,
I tried that but now when I try and build configure complains:

...
checking for boost/graph/adjacency_list.hpp... no
configure: error: boost library not found (boost/graph/adjacency_list.hpp).
===>  Script "configure" failed unexpectedly.
...

But it is installed.

I am guessing that updating the ports tree has changed things so now I need to update boost-libs however the package has not changed.. I am not sure if I have the wrong idea, or the package is out of date.

Any suggestions?
BTW I am on Discord (https://discord.gg/WYbhsz7T - Darius) and IRC (EFnet #bsdports as Darius) which may be a better venue for this back and forth.
